mapper.sql: id, invoice_id, invoice_no, imp_date, status, supplier_code, invoice_date, currency_code, exchange_rate, amount, amount_adjust, amount_rmb, customs_date, ship_date, declaration_no, gross_weight, weight, customs_fee, vat_fee, trans_fee, other_fee, arrived_warehouse_code, receive_warehouse_code, total_qty, box_qty, order_qty, receive_time, cost_time, create_time, update_time, update_user, create_user, amount_total, excise_tax, bargain_type, pay_day, invoice_type
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_po_invoice
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ops_po_invoice (id, invoice_id, invoice_no, imp_date, status, supplier_code, invoice_date, currency_code, exchange_rate, amount, amount_adjust, amount_rmb, customs_date, ship_date, declaration_no, gross_weight, weight, customs_fee, vat_fee, trans_fee, other_fee, arrived_warehouse_code, receive_warehouse_code, total_qty, box_qty, order_qty, receive_time, cost_time, create_time, update_time, update_user, create_user, amount_total, excise_tax, bargain_type, pay_day, invoice_type) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{impDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{supplierCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{invoiceDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{currencyCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{exchangeRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{amountAdjust,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{amountRmb,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{customsDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{shipDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{declarationNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{grossWeight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{customsFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{vatFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{transFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{otherFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{arrivedWarehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{receiveWarehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{totalQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{boxQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{orderQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{receiveTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{costTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{amountTotal,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{exciseTax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{bargainType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{payDay,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{invoiceType,jdbcType=INTEGER})

insert into dbo.ops_po_invoice
id,
invoice_id,
invoice_no,
imp_date,
status,
supplier_code,
invoice_date,

exchange_rate,

excise_tax,

invoice_type,

mapper.update:
update dbo.ops_po_invoice
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
invoice_id = #{record.invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
invoice_no = #{record.invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
imp_date = #{record.impDate,jdbcType=DATE},
status = #{record.status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
supplier_code = #{record.supplierCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
invoice_date = #{record.invoiceDate,jdbcType=DATE},
currency_code = #{record.currencyCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
exchange_rate = #{record.exchangeRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
amount = #{record.amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
amount_adjust = #{record.amountAdjust,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
amount_rmb = #{record.amountRmb,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
customs_date = #{record.customsDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ship_date = #{record.shipDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
declaration_no = #{record.declarationNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
gross_weight = #{record.grossWeight,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
weight = #{record.weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
customs_fee = #{record.customsFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
vat_fee = #{record.vatFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
trans_fee = #{record.transFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
other_fee = #{record.otherFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
arrived_warehouse_code = #{record.arrivedWarehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
receive_warehouse_code = #{record.receiveWarehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
total_qty = #{record.totalQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
box_qty = #{record.boxQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
order_qty = #{record.orderQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
receive_time = #{record.receiveTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
cost_time = #{record.costTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_user = #{record.updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
amount_total = #{record.amountTotal,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
excise_tax = #{record.exciseTax,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
bargain_type = #{record.bargainType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
pay_day = #{record.payDay,jdbcType=INTEGER},
invoice_type = #{record.invoiceType,jdbcType=INTEGER},

update dbo.ops_po_invoice set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, invoice_id = #{record.invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, invoice_no = #{record.invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, imp_date = #{record.impDate,jdbcType=DATE}, status = #{record.status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, supplier_code = #{record.supplierCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, invoice_date = #{record.invoiceDate,jdbcType=DATE}, currency_code = #{record.currencyCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, exchange_rate = #{record.exchangeRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, amount = #{record.amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, amount_adjust = #{record.amountAdjust,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, amount_rmb = #{record.amountRmb,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, customs_date = #{record.customsDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, ship_date = #{record.shipDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, declaration_no = #{record.declarationNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, gross_weight = #{record.grossWeight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, weight = #{record.weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, customs_fee = #{record.customsFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, vat_fee = #{record.vatFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, trans_fee = #{record.transFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, other_fee = #{record.otherFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, arrived_warehouse_code = #{record.arrivedWarehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, receive_warehouse_code = #{record.receiveWarehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, total_qty = #{record.totalQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, box_qty = #{record.boxQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, order_qty = #{record.orderQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, receive_time = #{record.receiveTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, cost_time = #{record.costTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_user = #{record.updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, amount_total = #{record.amountTotal,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, excise_tax = #{record.exciseTax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, bargain_type = #{record.bargainType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pay_day = #{record.payDay,jdbcType=INTEGER}, invoice_type = #{record.invoiceType,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update dbo.ops_po_invoice
invoice_id = #{invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
invoice_no = #{invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
imp_date = #{impDate,jdbcType=DATE},
status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
supplier_code = #{supplierCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
invoice_date = #{invoiceDate,jdbcType=DATE},
currency_code = #{currencyCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
exchange_rate = #{exchangeRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
amount = #{amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
amount_adjust = #{amountAdjust,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
amount_rmb = #{amountRmb,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
customs_date = #{customsDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ship_date = #{shipDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
declaration_no = #{declarationNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
gross_weight = #{grossWeight,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
weight = #{weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
customs_fee = #{customsFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
vat_fee = #{vatFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
trans_fee = #{transFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
other_fee = #{otherFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
arrived_warehouse_code = #{arrivedWarehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
receive_warehouse_code = #{receiveWarehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
total_qty = #{totalQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
box_qty = #{boxQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
order_qty = #{orderQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
receive_time = #{receiveTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
cost_time = #{costTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_user = #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_user = #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
amount_total = #{amountTotal,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
excise_tax = #{exciseTax,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
bargain_type = #{bargainType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
pay_day = #{payDay,jdbcType=INTEGER},
invoice_type = #{invoiceType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update dbo.ops_po_invoice set invoice_id = #{invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, invoice_no = #{invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, imp_date = #{impDate,jdbcType=DATE}, status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, supplier_code = #{supplierCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, invoice_date = #{invoiceDate,jdbcType=DATE}, currency_code = #{currencyCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, exchange_rate = #{exchangeRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, amount = #{amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, amount_adjust = #{amountAdjust,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, amount_rmb = #{amountRmb,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, customs_date = #{customsDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, ship_date = #{shipDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, declaration_no = #{declarationNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, gross_weight = #{grossWeight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, weight = #{weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, customs_fee = #{customsFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, vat_fee = #{vatFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, trans_fee = #{transFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, other_fee = #{otherFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, arrived_warehouse_code = #{arrivedWarehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, receive_warehouse_code = #{receiveWarehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, total_qty = #{totalQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, box_qty = #{boxQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, order_qty = #{orderQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, receive_time = #{receiveTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, cost_time = #{costTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_user = #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_user = #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, amount_total = #{amountTotal,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, excise_tax = #{exciseTax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, bargain_type = #{bargainType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pay_day = #{payDay,jdbcType=INTEGER}, invoice_type = #{invoiceType,jdbcType=INTEGER} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
